candidate_llm_application: LLM 'dark' training regime without internet-scale supervision: low-signal, slow-turnover learning from synthetic-only or distilled corpora; sparse-but-resilient capability emergence.

results.title: Synthetic-Only Training: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on synthetic-only training, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
